candidates.prompt: Design a compact 75 Ah NMC811 prismatic cell for an EV module. Use a high-loading cathode near 28 mg/cm2, a graphite-silicon anode, and an external thickness no greater than 26 mm. Prioritize usable energy and low inactive mass while maintaining manufacturability and safety.
Design a 120 Ah LFP prismatic cell for stationary storage in a 30 mm-thick aluminum enclosure. Prioritize long cycle life, low cost, conservative manufacturing values, and minimal inactive mass.

Design a custom 10 mm diameter, 45 mm long NMC cylindrical cell for an instrument. Use a 6 mm central mandrel to preserve an internal sensor channel, a mechanically robust steel can, traditional tabs, and the highest practical capacity while satisfying safety margins.
